name: Cable Crimpers
description: Battery-powered hydraulic cable crimping tools for electrical installation and industrial cabling. Professional-grade crimping for copper and aluminum conductors.

machines.name: Klauke EK12042CFB Battery Powered Hydraulic Crimping Tool
machines.shortDescription: Klauke EK12042CFB 12-tonne battery hydraulic crimper with auto-retract. German precision tool for copper and aluminium cable lugs from 10-400 mm² in LV and MV electrical work.
machines.description: Klauke EK12042CFB 12-tonne battery hydraulic crimper with auto-retract. German precision tool for copper and aluminium cable lugs from 10-400 mm² in LV and MV electrical work. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: 12 tonnes hydraulic force crimps 400 mm² copper and aluminium lugs in a single cycle
C-head rotates 350° for access to cables already positioned in confined cable trays and panels
Makita 18V battery shared with site power tools — no dedicated charger and battery system needed
Auto-retract piston reverses at max pressure and is ready for the next crimp in under 3 seconds
Interchangeable hexagonal die system covers the full 10-400 mm² range with 12 die sets
Klauke German engineering with 2-year warranty and service through UAE electrical distributors

machines.name: Burndy PAT750-LI Battery Actuated Hydraulic Crimper
machines.shortDescription: Burndy PAT750-LI 6-tonne battery hydraulic crimper with Dieless crimp head. Universal jaw design eliminates die changes for copper and aluminium connectors 8-750 MCM.
machines.description: Burndy PAT750-LI 6-tonne battery hydraulic crimper with Dieless crimp head. Universal jaw design eliminates die changes for copper and aluminium connectors 8-750 MCM. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Head Type: Dieless nest indentor — no die changes
specifications.Crimp Type: Nest indent with automatic pressure sensing
specifications.OLED Display: Crimp count, battery level, service reminders

features: Dieless nest indentor crimps every size from 8 to 750 MCM without changing a single die
Automatic pressure sensing stops at the target indent depth for consistent UL-listed crimps every time
OLED display with crimp counter verifies daily production and flags the 10,000-crimp service interval
5-8 second cycle — the fastest crimping tool in its class for high-volume panel-building work
6.0 kg with Burndy 18V battery platform — lightest 6-tonne-class hydraulic crimper available
Rotating head with LED work light illuminates the crimp zone in dark cable trenches and basements

machines.name: Greenlee EK425L Gator Battery-Powered Crimping Tool
machines.shortDescription: Greenlee EK425L 6-tonne battery crimper with i-press automatic cycle. Designed for copper and aluminium connectors with interchangeable jaw sets for LV panel and switchgear wiring.
machines.description: Greenlee EK425L 6-tonne battery crimper with i-press automatic cycle. Designed for copper and aluminium connectors with interchangeable jaw sets for LV panel and switchgear wiring. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Bluetooth: Crimp data logging via Greenlee Gator Eye app

features: i-press one-button automatic cycle — press the trigger and the tool does the full crimp and retract
Quick-change jaw system swaps between crimp, cut, and punch jaws in seconds without tools
Bluetooth data logging records every crimp with pressure and date for QA/QC documentation
5.8 kg with 360° head rotation for overhead crimping in cable trays and ceiling-mounted panels
Greenlee Gator battery system with fuel gauge — check charge level without removing the battery
6-300 mm² range covers every cable size in a standard LV distribution panel or switchgear build

machines.name: Ridgid RE 60 Electrical Tool (with Crimping Head)
machines.shortDescription: Ridgid RE 60 6-tonne electrical crimping tool with interchangeable heads. RIDGID versatility — one power unit switches between crimping, cutting, and punching for electrical installation.
machines.description: Ridgid RE 60 6-tonne electrical crimping tool with interchangeable heads. RIDGID versatility — one power unit switches between crimping, cutting, and punching for electrical installation. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Head System: Interchangeable: crimp, cut, punch, busbar punch heads

features: One power unit accepts crimp, cut, punch, and busbar punch heads — 4 tools in 1 for electrical crews
Ridgid 18V battery shared with the brand's full tool range across the construction fleet
42 mm stroke with rapid-advance piston design reduces cycle time on smaller conductor sizes
Integrated LED work light with auto-off timer eliminates the need for a separate head torch
6.5 kg with crimp head attached — balance-optimized for one-handed overhead crimping
Ridgid lifetime service agreement with warranty coverage and repair centres throughout the UAE
